title: Jira vs Smartsheet
description: Compare Jira vs Smartsheet in July 20. We analyzed features, pricing, user ratings, and real-world performance to help you choose the right project management tool.
verdict: After thorough evaluation, Smartsheet emerges as our recommendation for most users with a 4.3/5 rating compared to 4.1/5. However, the best choice depends on your specific needs. We recommend evaluating both tools against your requirements.

faqs.question: Which is better, Jira or Smartsheet?
faqs.answer: Based on our detailed comparison, Smartsheet edges ahead with a 4.3/5 rating. Jira excels at Jira is Atlassian's project management and issue tracking platform, originally b, while Smartsheet is stronger for Spreadsheet-based work management platform for enterprises..

faqs.question: What are the main differences between Jira and Smartsheet?
faqs.answer: Jira and Smartsheet differ in pricing (Free – $15.25/mo per user vs $7-25/mo), target audience, and feature focus. Our comparison table breaks down these differences.

faqs.question: Is Jira cheaper than Smartsheet?
faqs.answer: Jira starts at Free – $15.25/mo per user while Smartsheet starts at $7-25/mo. Consider total cost of ownership including implementation and training.

faqs.question: Which tool has better features, Jira or Smartsheet?
faqs.answer: Both platforms offer strong features for project management. Smartsheet scores higher overall, but specific feature needs may favor one over the other.

faqs.question: Can I use Jira and Smartsheet together?
faqs.answer: Many organizations use both tools for complementary purposes. However, for overlapping use cases, choosing one streamlines workflows.

faqs.question: Which is easier to use, Jira or Smartsheet?
faqs.answer: Both Jira and Smartsheet prioritize user experience. The best choice depends on your team's technical expertise and workflow preferences.

faqs.question: Which platform has better customer support?
faqs.answer: Both offer documentation and support tiers. The quality varies by plan level — check our detailed review for support comparisons.

faqs.question: Which project management tool is best for my team size?
faqs.answer: Enterprise features favor Jira for large teams, while Smartsheet may be more suitable for smaller teams with its Free – $15.25/mo per user pricing.
